headline: Should Cigna’s CEO Shift and Rebate‑Free PBM Overhaul Require Action From Cigna Group (CI) Investors?
summary: In late March 2026, The Cigna Group announced CEO David Cordani’s retirement and the appointment of Brian Evanko as his successor, alongside ongoing changes to its pharmacy benefit management model. Analysts have reacted positively, suggesting that Cigna’s rebate-free PBM transformation, recent FTC settlement, and PBM reform developments could reshape how its core Evernorth business operates within US healthcare. Next, we’ll examine how Cigna’s CEO transition, aligned with its rebate-free...
